text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's bad health isn't improving. Rumors
spread that I'm to blame for her inability to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unhappy with the situation, she resolves to
change public opinion by training more—only to
fall ill once more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see this and realize that the cause of her illness
is that she's trying too hard for the sake of others.
